title: rhamnus bungeana
intro: Rhamnus bungeana, also known as the Chinese buckthorn or Shan-zha, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Rhamnus bungeana include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve gastrointestinal issues, and support liver health. Rhamnus bungeana can be prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, with some manufacturers also offering capsules or extracts as a supplement.
